event: Russian February Revolution — crowd gathering in a snowy city square
description: A painting depicting a winter scene in a Russian city with crowds of people gathered in a snowy square. Multi-story buildings in yellow, red, and brown tones line the streets. A church bell tower rises prominently on the right side. The streets and rooftops are covered in white snow under a pale blue sky with clouds. Dark masses of people fill the square and streets below, suggesting a political gathering or demonstration. The style is impressionistic with bold, broad brushwork and vivid color contrasts between the white snow, colored buildings, and dark crowds.
